TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-pear_cinhua
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ira ku c'cay a malingaday.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʡʦaj a maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj.
S.FORM: ira ku c'cay a malingaday.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʡʦaj a maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj.
S.TRANSL: 有一位農夫.
There was a farmer .

S.FORM: mikalic tu kilang a mipitpit tu suiguo.
S.PHON: mikaɾiʦ tu kiɾaŋ a mipitpit tu sui*uo~u.
S.FORM: mikalic tu kilang a mipitpit tu suiguo.
S.PHON: mikaɾiʦ tu kiɾaŋ a mipitpit tu sui*uo~u.
S.TRANSL: 爬上樹去摘水果.

TRANSL.notes: (He) climbed up a tree to pick fruits.

S.TRANSL: climbed up a tree to pick fruits.

S.FORM: uya suiguo u kiyafes kura pitpitan nira.
S.PHON: uja sui*uo~u u kijafəs kura pitpitan nira.
S.FORM: uya suiguo u kiyafes kura pitpitan nira.
S.PHON: uja sui*uo~u u kijafəs kura pitpitan nira.
S.TRANSL: 他摘的那個水果是番石榴.
The fruit that he plucked is guava.

S.FORM: a telihan nira itini i kaayaw nira a miapid ku mipitpitan nira a suiguo.
S.PHON: a təɾiħan nira itini i kaajaw nira a miapiɬ~ɮ ku mipitpitan nira a sui*uo~u.
S.FORM: a telihan nira itini i kaayaw nira a miapid ku mipitpitan nira a suiguo.
S.PHON: a təɾiħan nira itini i kaajaw nira a miapiɬ~ɮ ku mipitpitan nira a sui*uo~u.
S.TRANSL: 他把前面的弄成袋子,把摘下來的水果放到前面的袋子.
He put the fruits he plucked into a bag in front of him.

S.FORM: ta maepud cingra mifun cingra a pateli itini i kanicaw.
S.PHON: ta maəpuɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra mifun ʦiŋra a patəɾi itini i kaniʦaw.
S.FORM: ta maepud cingra mifun cingra a pateli itini i kanicaw.
S.PHON: ta maəpuɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra mifun ʦiŋra a patəɾi itini i kaniʦaw.
S.TRANSL: 然後他下來,他卸下水果,並放到一個籃子裡.
Then he went down. He unpacked the fruits, and put them into a basket.

S.FORM: ta mafun nira itini kanicaw kuya mipipitpitan nira a kyafes.
S.PHON: ta mafun nira itini kaniʦaw kuja mipipitpitan nira a kjafəs.
S.FORM: ta mafun nira itini kanicaw kuya mipipitpitan nira a kyafes.
S.PHON: ta mafun nira itini kaniʦaw kuja mipipitpitan nira a kjafəs.
S.TRANSL: 之後,他把那個摘下的番石榴卸下到籃子裡.
Then, he put the guavas that he plucked into the basket.

S.FORM: miliyaw haca cingra a mikalic a mipitpit a mi tuya suiguo.
S.PHON: miɾijaw ħaʦa ʦiŋra a mikaɾiʦ a mipitpit a mi tuja sui*uo~u.
S.FORM: miliyaw haca cingra a mikalic a mipitpit a mi tuya suiguo.
S.PHON: miɾijaw ħaʦa ʦiŋra a mikaɾiʦ a mipitpit a mi tuja sui*uo~u.
S.TRANSL: 他再次爬上去,摘那個水果.
He climbed up again to pluck fruits.

S.FORM: ta telien nira itini i kaayaw nu nira.
S.PHON: ta təɾiən nira itini i kaajaw nu nira.
S.FORM: ta telien nira itini i kaayaw nu nira.
S.PHON: ta təɾiən nira itini i kaajaw nu nira.
S.TRANSL: 放到前面.
He put them in the front.

S.FORM: nikawrila ira ku c'cay a mi mipaka'enay tu siri a mitafsiw tu pipitpit nunian a c'cay a tamdaw.
S.PHON: nikawriɾa ira ku ʦʡʦaj a mi mipakaʡənaj tu siri a mitafsiw tu pipitpit nunian a ʦʡʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.FORM: nikawrila ira ku c'cay a mi mipaka'enay tu siri a mitafsiw tu pipitpit nunian a c'cay a tamdaw.
S.PHON: nikawriɾa ira ku ʦʡʦaj a mi mipakaʡənaj tu siri a mitafsiw tu pipitpit nunian a ʦʡʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.TRANSL: 然而,有一位放羊人,經過這個摘水果的這一個人.
However, there was a shepherd who passed the person who was plucking fruits.

S.FORM: tuya pipitpit nu nira.
S.PHON: tuja pipitpit nu nira.
S.FORM: tuya pipitpit nu nira.
S.PHON: tuja pipitpit nu nira.
S.TRANSL: 這個人在摘水果.
He was plucking fruits.

S.FORM: ira ku c'cay a wawa tu pakakurisiway.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʡʦaj a wawa tu pakakurisiwaj.
S.FORM: ira ku c'cay a wawa tu pakakurisiway.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʡʦaj a wawa tu pakakurisiwaj.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩,他騎著腳踏車.
There was a child who was riding a bicycle.

S.FORM: manengneng nira kuya mipitpitan nunian a malingaday a tamdaw.
S.PHON: manəŋnəŋ nira kuja mipitpitan nunian a maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.FORM: manengneng nira kuya mipitpitan nunian a malingaday a tamdaw.
S.PHON: manəŋnəŋ nira kuja mipitpitan nunian a maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw.

TRANSL.notes: 他看到那個摘(水果),工作的那個人.

S.TRANSL: 他看到那個摘 ,工作的那個人.

TRANSL.notes: He saw the worker, who was plucking (fruits).

S.TRANSL: He saw the worker, who was plucking .

S.FORM: maala nira ku c'cay a a langa.
S.PHON: maaɾa nira ku ʦʡʦaj a a ɾaŋa.
S.FORM: maala nira ku c'cay a a langa.
S.PHON: maaɾa nira ku ʦʡʦaj a a ɾaŋa.
S.TRANSL: 他拿了一籠
He took one basket.

S.FORM: ta pakalicen nira itini i kurisiw nira.
S.PHON: ta pakaɾiʦən nira itini i kurisiw nira.
S.FORM: ta pakalicen nira itini i kurisiw nira.
S.PHON: ta pakaɾiʦən nira itini i kurisiw nira.
S.TRANSL: 然後把它放到腳踏車上.
Then he put it onto the bicycle.

S.FORM: milaliw cingra.
S.PHON: miɾaɾiw ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: milaliw cingra.
S.PHON: miɾaɾiw ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他離開了.
He left.

S.FORM: matakaw nira kiya c'cay a langa nu ya suiguo nira a kyafes.
S.PHON: matakaw nira kija ʦʡʦaj a ɾaŋa nu ja sui*uo~u nira a kjafəs.
S.FORM: matakaw nira kiya c'cay a langa nu ya suiguo nira a kyafes.
S.PHON: matakaw nira kija ʦʡʦaj a ɾaŋa nu ja sui*uo~u nira a kjafəs.
S.TRANSL: 他偷走了一籠番石榴的水果.
He stole a basket of fruits, that is, guavas.

S.FORM: ta pakakurisiw kuya wawa mastul nira ku c'cay a fukeloh mapulin.
S.PHON: ta pakakurisiw kuja wawa mastuɾ nira ku ʦʡʦaj a fukəɾo~uħ mapuɾin.
S.FORM: ta pakakurisiw kuya wawa mastul nira ku c'cay a fukeloh mapulin.
S.PHON: ta pakakurisiw kuja wawa mastuɾ nira ku ʦʡʦaj a fukəɾo~uħ mapuɾin.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩騎著腳踏車,撞到了一塊石頭,摔倒了.
That child, riding a bicycle, tripped over a stone and fell.

S.FORM: laklak satu kuya suiguo nira itira i lalan.
S.PHON: ɾakɾak satu kuja sui*uo~u nira itira i ɾaɾan.
S.FORM: laklak satu kuya suiguo nira itira i lalan.
S.PHON: ɾakɾak satu kuja sui*uo~u nira itira i ɾaɾan.
S.TRANSL: 水果散落在道路上.
His fruits were scattered over the road.

S.FORM: ta padangen nu tatuluay a wawa cingra a miparu tuya langa.
S.PHON: ta paɬ~ɮaŋən nu tatuɾuaj a wawa ʦiŋra a miparu tuja ɾaŋa.
S.FORM: ta padangen nu tatuluay a wawa cingra a miparu tuya langa.
S.PHON: ta paɬ~ɮaŋən nu tatuɾuaj a wawa ʦiŋra a miparu tuja ɾaŋa.

TRANSL.notes: 三個小孩子幫忙他裝(水果)到籠子裡.

S.TRANSL: 三個小孩子幫忙他裝 到籠子裡.
Three children helped that child load the basket.

S.FORM: ta matumus nira kuya langa.
S.PHON: ta matumus nira kuja ɾaŋa.
S.FORM: ta matumus nira kuya langa.
S.PHON: ta matumus nira kuja ɾaŋa.
S.TRANSL: 他裝籠子.
He loaded the basket.

S.FORM: a mi paru a mipadang a mipudpud.
S.PHON: a mi paru a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ a mipuɬ~ɮpuɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: a mi paru a mipadang a mipudpud.
S.PHON: a mi paru a mipaɬ~ɮaŋ a mipuɬ~ɮpuɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 幫忙撿 .
helped pick up .

S.FORM: milaliwtu kuya wawa.
S.PHON: miɾaɾiwtu kuja wawa.
S.FORM: milaliwtu kuya wawa.
S.PHON: miɾaɾiwtu kuja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩離開了.
The child left.

S.FORM: nikawlira tahira i fatad kuya wawa tiuhan niya c widang nira.
S.PHON: nikawɾira taħira i fataɬ~ɮ kuja wawa tiuħan nija ʦ wiɬ~ɮaŋ nira.
S.FORM: nikawlira tahira i fatad kuya wawa tiuhan niya c widang nira.
S.PHON: nikawɾira taħira i fataɬ~ɮ kuja wawa tiuħan nija ʦ wiɬ~ɮaŋ nira.
S.TRANSL: 然而,那個小孩走到半路,他的朋友咻的一聲吹口哨.
However, halfway, his friends whistled.

S.FORM: matawad nira ku kafung.
S.PHON: matawaɬ~ɮ nira ku kafuŋ.
S.FORM: matawad nira ku kafung.
S.PHON: matawaɬ~ɮ nira ku kafuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他忘記了帽子.
He forgot the hat.

S.FORM: ta pafulien haca nuya widang nira tiya tatuluay a wawa kuya kafung tuya mitakaway tu suiguo a wawa.
S.PHON: ta pafuɾiən ħaʦa nuja wiɬ~ɮaŋ nira tija tatuɾuaj a wawa kuja kafuŋ tuja mitakawaj tu sui*uo~u a wawa.
S.FORM: ta pafulien haca nuya widang nira tiya tatuluay a wawa kuya kafung tuya mitakaway tu suiguo a wawa.
S.PHON: ta pafuɾiən ħaʦa nuja wiɬ~ɮaŋ nira tija tatuɾuaj a wawa kuja kafuŋ tuja mitakawaj tu sui*uo~u a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友,那三個小孩,把帽子還給那個偷水果的小孩.
His friends, those three children, returned the hat to the child, who stole the fruits.

S.FORM: ta m manga'ay ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: ta m maŋaʡaj ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.FORM: ta m manga'ay ku falucu' nira.
S.PHON: ta m maŋaʡaj ku faɾuʦuʡ nira.
S.TRANSL: 他的心腸很好.
He was kind.

S.FORM: pafelien nira kuya wawa tu alac'cay tuya suiguo.
S.PHON: pafəɾiən nira kuja wawa tu aɾaʦʡʦaj tuja sui*uo~u.
S.FORM: pafelien nira kuya wawa tu alac'cay tuya suiguo.
S.PHON: pafəɾiən nira kuja wawa tu aɾaʦʡʦaj tuja sui*uo~u.
S.TRANSL: 給了那些小孩一人一個水果.
He gave each person a fruit.

S.FORM: ta milaliwtu kuya tatuluay tiya mipadangay tuya mitakaway tuya suiguo a pakakurisiway a wawa.
S.PHON: ta miɾaɾiwtu kuja tatuɾuaj tija mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj tuja mitakawaj tuja sui*uo~u a pakakurisiwaj a wawa.
S.FORM: ta milaliwtu kuya tatuluay tiya mipadangay tuya mitakaway tuya suiguo a pakakurisiway a wawa.
S.PHON: ta miɾaɾiwtu kuja tatuɾuaj tija mipaɬ~ɮaŋaj tuja mitakawaj tuja sui*uo~u a pakakurisiwaj a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 然後,他們三個就離開了那個偷水果,騎著腳踏車的小孩.
Then, they left the child who rode a bicycle and stole the fruits.

S.FORM: ta tahira kuya tatuluay a wawa tuya mipitpitay tu suiguo a matu'asay a fayinayan.
S.PHON: ta taħira kuja tatuɾuaj a wawa tuja mipitpitaj tu sui*uo~u a matuʡasaj a fajinajan.
S.FORM: ta tahira kuya tatuluay a wawa tuya mipitpitay tu suiguo a matu'asay a fayinayan.
S.PHON: ta taħira kuja tatuɾuaj a wawa tuja mipitpitaj tu sui*uo~u a matuʡasaj a fajinajan.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩到了那個摘水果的年長男性的那邊.
Those three children came to where the elder was plucking fruits.

S.FORM: manengneng nira kuya tataluay a wawa tu nikakuma'en nu ya wawa.
S.PHON: manəŋnəŋ nira kuja tataɾuaj a wawa tu nikakumaʡən nu ja wawa.
S.FORM: manengneng nira kuya tataluay a wawa tu nikakuma'en nu ya wawa.
S.PHON: manəŋnəŋ nira kuja tataɾuaj a wawa tu nikakumaʡən nu ja wawa.

TRANSL.notes: 他看到了那三個小孩,正在吃(水果)的小孩.

S.TRANSL: 他看到了那三個小孩,正在吃 的小孩.

TRANSL.notes: He saw the three children, who were eating (fruits).

S.TRANSL: He saw the three children, who were eating .

S.FORM: maepudtu cingra tu sakinatusa nira a mipitpit m awa kunian a c'cay a langa aku a suiguo.
S.PHON: maəpuɬ~ɮtu ʦiŋra tu sakinatusa nira a mipitpit m awa kunian a ʦʡʦaj a ɾaŋa aku a sui*uo~u.
S.FORM: maepudtu cingra tu sakinatusa nira a mipitpit m awa kunian a c'cay a langa aku a suiguo.
S.PHON: maəpuɬ~ɮtu ʦiŋra tu sakinatusa nira a mipitpit m awa kunian a ʦʡʦaj a ɾaŋa aku a sui*uo~u.
S.TRANSL: 當他第二次摘取,下來的時候,「我的一籠水果怎麼不在了?」
He plucked fruits the second time and went down, "How come one basket of fruits is gone?"

S.FORM: sa'an kuya kuya mi mipitpitay tuya suiguo a tamdaw manengneng nira kuya tatuluay a wawa.
S.PHON: saʡan kuja kuja mi mipitpitaj tuja sui*uo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw manəŋnəŋ nira kuja tatuɾuaj a wawa.
S.FORM: sa'an kuya kuya mi mipitpitay tuya suiguo a tamdaw manengneng nira kuya tatuluay a wawa.
S.PHON: saʡan kuja kuja mi mipitpitaj tuja sui*uo~u a tamɬ~ɮaw manəŋnəŋ nira kuja tatuɾuaj a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 摘水果的那個人看到了那三個小孩.
The person who plucked fruits saw those three children.

S.FORM: ta mitakaway kuninian wasanaytu ku falucu' nira saka nengnenghan nira kuya wawa.
S.PHON: ta mitakawaj kuninian wasanajtu ku faɾuʦuʡ nira saka nəŋnəŋħan nira kuja wawa.
S.FORM: ta mitakaway kuninian wasanaytu ku falucu' nira saka nengnenghan nira kuya wawa.
S.PHON: ta mitakawaj kuninian wasanajtu ku faɾuʦuʡ nira saka nəŋnəŋħan nira kuja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 在他看到那些小孩之後,他心裡確信他們就是小偷.
Seeing those children, he believed that they were the thieves.
